title: PR - Connected Textures
description: Connected Textures Addon for PrettyRealistic PBR Resource Pack. Needs Continuity or Optifine to work.
body:
## **About**
This addon is a 32x version of the [original version](https://www.patreon.com/posts/118084053) and connects textures for the [PrettyRealistic PBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettyrealistic/gallery) resource pack
## **How to Use** Needs Continuity or Optifine + PrettyRealistic resource pack to work. (make sure this addon is on top of the resource pack in the resource packs menu)

## **More Content**
Come on in and join my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/CaspersTextures), [Ko-Fi Page](https://ko-fi.com/casperstextures) and [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/4yZfmYDYRB) for 'Work in progress' and textures up to 512x!

### **Progress** This Addon only has a couple blocks supported for now, but has updates planned for the future.
See what's in the main PR pack so far in this Trello Board: [Everything in PR so far](https://trello.com/b/os5sVqpF?filter=member:none)
